## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up and knowledge sharing between Matt Forloine and Marcel Santilli, focusing on Marcel's journey with growthx.ai and insights into building an AI-powered service business.](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's growthx.ai journey: From personal struggles to building a successful, bootstrapped AI-powered service business ($7.4M ARR, $12M raised)](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Business model: Service-first approach to find product-market fit, then build tech for leverage and differentiation](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Organizational structure: Pods led by high-caliber managing directors, with a focus on MRR per dollar of headcount cost](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Tech stack: AI-powered workflow engine underneath, enabling efficient service delivery and continuous learning](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Personal and Professional Journey

  - [Overcame challenges at ScaleAI and fertility struggles](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [Found better work-life balance at Deegram, then started growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Current schedule: 5 AM start, home by 4:30 PM for family time, work later if needed](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Bootstrapped growthx.ai to profitability before raising $12M at $80M post-money valuation](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)

### growthx.ai Business Model and Structure

  - [Service-first approach: Solved immediate customer needs, built trust through workshops](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Organizational structure: Pods led by managing directors (e.g., ex-TripAdvisor, G2, ClickUp leaders)](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Hiring strategy: High-caliber talent, leveraging international hiring for cost efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Key metric: MRR per dollar of headcount cost](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)

### Technology and Product Development

  - [Three layers: Service packaging, workflow streamlining, and underlying AI engine](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Building an AI decoding agent for workflow creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
  - [Focus on creating a "GitHub for knowledge work" to increase productivity](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
  - [Balance between service delivery and automation/tech development](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)

### Pricing and Go-to-Market Strategy

  - [Packages priced between $9,000-$10,000/month, positioned as high-value compared to individual tools/freelancers](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [Initially focused on one core offering (content strategy and production) before expanding](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
  - [Now offering 2-3 different packages/work streams, with some customers at $40k/month](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matt to potentially attend Marcel's upcoming webinar on growthx.ai's playbook](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Matt to send additional questions for Marcel to potentially include in his content](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
  - [Matt and Marcel to connect at the AI agent conference in New York (May 6-7)](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Potential dinner meetup during the conference, schedules permitting](https://fathom.video/share/j3xmmBUxFbvb8A4QfWc8iEr-8nQfXPM8?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
